message:
fix(freeze): use C FFI for closure variable access in opcode_emitter

The opcode_emitter was using getVarRef which directly dereferences
Zig's extern struct for JSVarRef. However, the JSVarRef struct layout
in C doesn't match Zig's extern struct due to GC header union alignment
differences.

This caused closure variables to return garbage values, making
benchmarks like path_trace return 0.0ms (loops terminated immediately
because WIDTH/HEIGHT weren't accessible).

Changed get_var_ref* opcodes to use getClosureVar which properly uses
C FFI (js_frozen_get_var_ref) to access closure variables.

Also added vstack tracking for define_field to support method chaining.
